meaning: Chief Executive Officer 执行总裁
examples: The CEO has named a new chief financial officer.
The new CEO is an educated, amiable, and decent man.
Mr. Cross will assume the role of CEO with a team of four directors.
Perhaps they should have taken a cue from Greenwood and given CEO Waksal a time-out.
And again and again, MCI CEO Michael Capellas Michael Capellas has given Qwest the cold shoulder.
